implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Module-level broker and FastStream app with lifespan
Lifespan enters async_store_context and exposes store via broker context
Unit tests for lifespan entry/exit with mocked store
Unit test for startup failure with unreachable database (ASSUM-006)
Service layer boundary enforcement (no NATS imports in store/embed/settings)

completion_promises.criterion_text: src/fleet_memory/app.py exports module-level broker and a FastStream app whose lifespan enters async_store_context(settings) and exposes the store (app/broker context attribute); no @broker.subscriber present; python -c 'from fleet_memory.app import app, broker' exits 0 with required FLEET_MEMORY_ env set
completion_promises.evidence: Verified src/fleet_memory/app.py exports module-level broker and app via _create_app() factory. Lifespan context manager enters async_store_context(settings) and exposes store via broker.context.set_global('store', store). No @broker.subscriber decorators present in file. Module imports cleanly as verified by test_app_import_succeeds_with_valid_env.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Lifespan unit test using TestNatsBroker enters and exits cleanly with a fake embed and a mocked/stubbed store context — no real NATS, no real Postgres
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_lifespan_enters_and_exits_cleanly_with_fake_store patches async_store_context with mock that yields fake store, uses TestNatsBroker, and manually invokes app.lifespan_context. Verifies store.setup() is called during entry. Test passes - no real NATS or Postgres connections.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Startup-failure unit test: with a DSN pointing at a closed local port and the REAL store context, lifespan entry raises within pg_connect_timeout_s plus slack (test wall-clock under 15 s) and the error names the database target without leaking the password — ASSUM-006 verification: record the actual observed driver timeout behaviour in a test comment
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_startup_failure_with_unreachable_database sets DSN to closed port 65432 with pg_connect_timeout_s=5.0. Verifies lifespan entry raises exception within 15s wall-clock time and password 'secretpass' is NOT in error message. Test docstring documents ASSUM-006 observation: 'psycopg3 with psycopg-pool respects the timeout parameter in pool_kwargs and fails fast when the target port is unreachable.' Test passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: grep -rE 'from nats|import nats|faststream' src/fleet_memory/store.py src/fleet_memory/embed.py src/fleet_memory/settings.py exits non-zero (service layers carry zero broker imports — handler/service boundary)
completion_promises.evidence: Executed grep command this turn: exit code 1 (non-zero), confirming NO NATS or FastStream imports in store.py, embed.py, or settings.py. Service layer boundary properly enforced - these modules contain zero broker imports.

Executed pytest this turn: 4 passed, 1 warning in 0.36s. All tests pass cleanly: test_lifespan_enters_and_exits_cleanly_with_fake_store, test_startup_failure_with_unreachable_database, test_app_import_succeeds_with_valid_env, test_no_subscribers_registered_on_broker.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
